lines.speaker: Lowe
lines.text: Welcome to Lowe's Archery Emporium. Do you want to see my wares?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have this voucher for completing the combat Adventure Path, it says to come talk to you about claiming my Adventure Path reward.

lines.speaker: Lowe
lines.text: I will be able to give you your reward when you have some space for it.

lines.speaker: Lowe
lines.text: Why yes, here are some high-quality iron arrows.

lines.speaker: Lowe
lines.text: I do have more rewards for you, but you need to be on a members world for me to give you the reward. Maybe there is something else I can help you with.

lines.speaker: Lowe
lines.text: I do have more rewards for you, but you need to be on a members world for me to give you the reward. Maybe there is something else I can help you with.

lines.speaker: Lowe
lines.text: Why yes, here are some high-quality iron arrows.

lines.speaker: Lowe
lines.text: Since you are a member, I'll also give you extra arrows and one of my finest bows.

lines.speaker: Lowe
lines.text: I sell a variety of range equipment in my shop if you wanted to take a look.

lines.speaker: Lowe
lines.text: Is there anything else I can do for you?

lines.speaker: Lowe
lines.text: I do have more rewards for you, but you need some free space for me to give you the rewards.

lines.speaker: Lowe
lines.text: Can I help you with anything else?

lines.speaker: Lowe
lines.text: Why yes, here is one of my finest bows and some high- quality iron arrows.

lines.speaker: Lowe
lines.text: I sell a variety of range equipment in my shop if you wanted to take a look.

lines.speaker: Lowe
lines.text: Is there anything else I can do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I prefer to bash things close up.
